channel.title: Junseo Oh Tech Blog
channel.description: Technical insights of Junseo Oh, Semiconductor Packaging & Test Engineer

item.title: Continuous Integration Pipelines for Static Sites via GitHub Actions
item.description: Automating compile scripts and static file deployments through cloud runner workflows.

item.title: Split Ergonomic Keyboards: An Engineering Approach to RSI Prevention
item.description: How split board physical layouts and tenting angles prevent shoulder rolling and carpal tunnel syndrome.

item.title: Building Sub-Second Summary Pipelines with Groq Llama-3 API
item.description: Connecting fast Groq LPU engine endpoints to parse text inputs and return abstract summaries under 500ms.

item.title: Version-Controlled Architecture: Introducing Mermaid.js in Markdown
item.description: Ditching static image mockups to write live, auto-rendering vector charts directly in raw markdown code.

item.title: From Vibe Coding to Harness Engineering: Pushing AI Coding Limits
item.description: Moving past lazy chat-based vibe coding to design rigorous execution sandboxes (Harnesses) that force AI agents to perform reliably.

item.title: The Limits of Vibe Coding and the Necessity of Harness Engineering
item.description: Moving beyond conversational code generation to design environment constraints (Harnesses) that force AI agents to perform reliably.

item.title: Leveraging Git Worktree to Handle Emergency Hotfixes Seamlessly
item.description: How to create parallel working directories inside a single git repository to bypass git stash context-switching bottlenecks.

item.title: Engineering a Resume into a System Architecture
item.description: A system engineering whitepaper outlining the design intent and Zero-Dependency architecture of a Figma-style interactive web portfolio.

item.title: Thinking Can Be Outsourced, But Understanding Cannot
item.description: In the Software 3.0 era where LLMs handle coding logistics, what is the irreplaceable value of a human engineer?

item.title: Extreme Scoping for AI Agents via Project Rules
item.description: Limiting context sizes and reducing token consumption to dramatically increase agent precision and coding success rates.

item.title: Sizing Pull-up Resistors for Reliable I2C Bus Communication
item.description: Calculating pull-up resistor boundaries using bus capacitance and I2C rise time limits.

item.title: Building "A Semiconductor Rookie's AI Survival Log" Brand Strategy
item.description: Positioning a mentoring brand for tech students by leveraging career counseling backgrounds and real-world engineer reality.

item.title: TDD and Automated Test Guardrails for AI Self-Correction
item.description: Forcing AI agents to write and run unit tests inside the terminal, creating a closed self-debugging loop before declaring completion.

item.title: OP-AMP Input Driver Design for High-Precision SAR ADCs
item.description: Calculating Charge-Kickback filter parameters and OP-AMP bandwidths to secure complete voltage settling before conversion.

item.title: Maximizing AI Agent Efficiency via the "Tool Diet" Strategy
item.description: Why overloading LLM agents with too many APIs degrades performance, and how minimalist toolkits build smarter assistants.

item.title: Building a Private Local "NotebookLM" on an 8GB RAM MacBook
item.description: How to build a low-resource private research pipeline by integrating Zotero 7, Safari, and Obsidian (Copilot + Gemini API).

item.title: Andrej Karpathy-Style Rules for Communicating with AI Agents
item.description: Stripping away conversational filler to command LLM agents via clean, structured, and predictable interfaces.

item.title: LDO vs Buck Converters: Decoupling Noise from Sensitive Analog Rails
item.description: Comparing the noise spectrum, efficiency tradeoffs, and PSRR of linear LDOs against high-efficiency buck switchers.

item.title: Managing Intra-pair Skew in High-Speed Differential Signals
item.description: Adjusting differential trace lengths on PCBs to prevent phase shifts and secure signal integrity margins.

item.title: Single-Responsibility Tasking: Splitting Large Coding Missions
item.description: How to divide complex developer requirements into isolated milestones, helping AI perform perfectly on each turn.
